description_long: This is a human figure modeled as a jogger, featuring a bald head and a light brown complexion. The jogger is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve yellowish-beige top and bright red, close-fitting pants that reach the ankles. The hands are relaxed and slightly open, and the feet are covered with matching red footwear. The figure's build is athletic, with visible muscle definition in the arms and legs, and the posture is streamlined for running. No visible accessories or headwear are present, and the overall appearance is that of a person in mid-stride, ready for urban jogging.
description: Athletic jogger figure with a bald head, yellow-beige top, and bright red fitted pants and shoes, posed in a running position.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the bald head, broad shoulders, and the full expanse of the yellow-beige shirt and red pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, arm, and leg alignment, as well as the fitted nature of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the full length of the red pants and shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the facial profile, arm, and leg positions, and the overall running posture.
attribute_clothing_type: Fitted long-sleeve yellow-beige shirt and bright red, close-fitting pants made of a stretch fabric.
attribute_footwear_type: Red running shoes with a low profile and no visible brand markings.
attribute_running_posture: The jogger is depicted in a horizontal, streamlined running posture with arms extended slightly backward and legs straight, suggesting a mid-stride or sprinting motion. The body is aligned and appears relaxed.
